classification: protocol-preserving implementation and audit repair; not an R4 method change and not a scientific-gate failure

evaluation_determinism_repair.diagnosis: The formal evaluator inherited deterministic_ce from the training manifest but did not configure deterministic algorithms and math-only SDPA in its own process.
locked_repair: formal evaluation explicitly requests strict determinism
configure_strict_cuda_determinism runs before the first CUDA probe or model load
the prediction report records the observed evaluation runtime backend
the scientific scorer independently validates the observed training and evaluation reports
training and evaluation strict-determinism reports must match exactly
unchanged: Reader listwise objective and choice permutations
data, target labels, presentations, thresholds, and stopping rules

suite_manifest_repair.diagnosis: Path.write_text used host-native newline translation: the preregistered Windows artifacts used CRLF while the Linux Inspire copies used LF despite identical parsed JSON and identical train/gate/sidecar payload hashes.
suite_manifest_repair.fail_closed_consumption: The micro renderer and materializer bind and verify the exact suite manifest as well as train and gate payloads.
